text: Science has a clearer story about model distillation than social media does. Model distillation simplifies complex AI models, making them faster and more efficient. Imagine taking a giant, slow beast and turning it into a nimble, agile creature. Researchers use techniques like ‘teacher-student’ training, where a simpler model learns from a complex one. The result? Models that retain key insights but run faster with less power! Want to dive deeper into AI concepts? Hit that follow button for more!
